feasibility.title: Compliance Report
feasibility.subtitle: AI-powered analysis...
feasibility.readyToAnalyzeDesc: Select a vessel and cargo to run the compliance analysis and view the report.
feasibility.exportFailed: Failed to generate PDF. Please try again.
feasibility.msgUnknownCombo: Unknown combination: {cargoType} cargo with {coatingType} coating. Conservative scoring applied.
feasibility.msgHazardSafeguards: {hazardClass} hazardous cargo requires additional structural safeguards.
feasibility.msgVesselAge: Vessel is {vesselAge} years old — enhanced hull inspection recommended.
feasibility.msgThermalNotSupported: {vesselType} lacks standard thermal management systems for temperature-controlled cargo.
feasibility.msgCoatingThermalCycling: Coating may degrade under thermal cycling in refrigerated operations.
feasibility.msgNoTempRequired: No temperature control requirements for this cargo.
feasibility.msgEcaAdditionalControls: {vesselType} may require additional emission controls for ECA zone transit.
feasibility.msgEcaSpecialHandling: {hazardClass} cargo requires special ECA zone handling and documentation.
feasibility.msgEcaOlderVessel: Older vessel may not meet current ECA emission tier requirements.
feasibility.ruleFlag_zincReactsAcidic: Zinc silicate reacts with acidic liquid cargoes
feasibility.ruleFlag_zincAbrasion: Monitor for abrasion wear on zinc silicate
feasibility.ruleFlag_breakBulkDamage: Risk of coating damage from heavy break bulk items
feasibility.ruleFlag_stainlessSlippery: Stainless steel decks may be slippery for wheeled cargo
feasibility.ruleFlag_zincWheelTraffic: Zinc silicate cannot withstand wheeled traffic abrasion
feasibility.ruleFlag_epoxyThermalCycling: Monitor epoxy integrity under thermal cycling
feasibility.ruleFlag_zincCondensation: Zinc silicate degrades under condensation and thermal stress
feasibility.ruleFlag_zincCryogenic: Zinc silicate fails at cryogenic temperatures
feasibility.ruleFlag_phenolicCryogenic: Phenolic epoxy not rated for cryogenic service
feasibility.ruleNote_zincLiquidBulk: Zinc silicate is not recommended for liquid bulk due to potential chemical reaction with acidic or alkaline cargoes.
feasibility.ruleNote_zincRoro: Zinc silicate is not suitable for RoRo operations due to rapid coating degradation from vehicle traffic.
feasibility.ruleNote_zincRefrigerated: Zinc silicate fails under refrigerated conditions due to moisture condensation and thermal expansion mismatch.
feasibility.ruleNote_epoxyGas: Standard epoxy coatings become brittle and fail at cryogenic temperatures required for gas cargo.
feasibility.ruleNote_zincGas: Zinc silicate is completely unsuitable for gas carrier tanks due to cryogenic brittleness.
feasibility.ruleNote_phenolicGas: Phenolic epoxy lacks cryogenic certification required for LPG/LNG containment systems.
